factors.rationale: The product is the dominant focal point and easily identifiable.
The product is presented without a clear use context.
The image clearly communicates the benefit of full protection.
The layout is organized, making the product and text easy to read.
The image showcases the texture and details of the product.
There are no visible trust signals in the image.
The image has strong contrast and is easily readable.
The image resembles a generic product listing rather than a campaign.
